name: Popovers from the Seymour House
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the milk, flour, eggs, and salt until well combined. Do not overmix.
2. Pour the batter into 8 well-greased muffin cups.
3. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 15 minutes in a preheated oven.
4. Reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C) and continue baking for another 15 minutes.
5. Serve immediately with butter and a mixture of cinnamon and sugar. Use salt and pepper shakers as desired.
